acceptance.assertion: A validated software-pilot snapshot compiles deterministically into a Visual System v2 board specification and Miro DSL.
acceptance.verifier: merged implementation, tests and bound receipts

acceptance.assertion: The generated board passes the v2 quality gate with at least 90 points, no blockers and explicit evidence separation.
acceptance.verifier: merged implementation, tests and bound receipts

acceptance.assertion: Source authority, revisions, tests, risks and non-claims remain visible and digest-bound; missing or failed source data cannot appear current.
acceptance.verifier: merged implementation, tests and bound receipts

acceptance.assertion: The existing software-pilot renderer and command remain compatible while v2 outputs are opt-in until adoption evidence is complete.
acceptance.verifier: merged implementation, tests and bound receipts

acceptance.assertion: One fresh isolated Miro board is created from the generated v2 DSL and checked by remote conformance plus a bounded visual review, or the unavailable provider evidence is recorded as an explicit open gate.
acceptance.verifier: merged implementation, tests and bound receipts

acceptance.assertion: Tests, CI, complete diff, diff-bound self-review, mergeability and post-merge validation pass before the task is verified.
acceptance.verifier: merged implementation, tests and bound receipts

approval.note: Repository changes require a complete GitHub diff, head- and diff-bound self-review, green CI and exact post-merge validation. A live Miro write may target only a newly created isolated board.

goal: Compile a real software-pilot snapshot into a source-bound, narrative and quality-gated Visual System v2 board while preserving the existing renderer as an explicit compatibility path.

post_merge_validation.result: 546 tests plus Ruff, compileall and registry validation passed

metadata.outcome: The Lenskit software pilot compiles into a seven-frame Visual System v2 board with bounded collections, semantic object selection, exact remote conformance and a separate human visual review. The legacy renderer remains the default compatibility path.

verified_acceptance.compatibility: Verified by regression tests: the legacy four-column renderer remains the default and its receipt shape is unchanged unless v2 output is requested.
verified_acceptance.live-proof: Verified on one fresh isolated board: 49 created, 0 failed, exact remote conformance and a seven-axis human visual PASS. Authenticated screenshot evidence remains explicitly unavailable.
verified_acceptance.merge-gates: Verified by PR #87: complete diff, bound PASS review, green Python 3.11 and 3.12 CI, byte-equal merge tree and 546 post-merge tests.
verified_acceptance.quality-gate: Verified by quality digest 9561bdd5: 100/100, no blocker, no warning, 42 declared objects and zero sticky notes.
verified_acceptance.real-content: Verified by merged PR #87 and board digest b55b1df5: a validated Lenskit snapshot deterministically compiles into a seven-frame v2 specification and Miro DSL.
verified_acceptance.truth: Verified by committed evidence: source revisions, snapshot digest and the absent observation timestamp are explicit; freshness is not invented.

rejected_iteration.reason: Six tables across seven frames remained too form-like despite a 100/100 automatic score.
rejected_iteration.remote_cleanup: unavailable because provider exposes neither board delete nor board rename

title: Apply Visual System v2 to the software pilot
